title: Adaptive Trust Consensus for Blockchain IoT
summary: Designed a trust-consensus framework using RL/DRL/MARL agents under adversarial settings for blockchain-enabled IoT networks and completed a comparative analysis of RL-model behavior for blockchain security.

title: NLP Techniques in Chi-Square Tests and Feature Selection
summary: Proposed an NLP pipeline to interpret natural-language statistical prompts and solve chi-square goodness-of-fit and independence test tasks.

title: Enhancing Public Speaking Skills through AI-Powered Analysis and Feedback
summary: Built a multimodal feedback framework combining speech, NLP, and computer vision signals for public-speaking improvement.
